creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

This type of patch would be more appropriately sent to the upstream project, but I know that development has been quite inactive in recent years. Even so, it would be good to submit the patch to the apcupsd-users mailing list. Here at FreeBSD, we could add the patch as an option (not active by default) to seek more feedback. Would that be okay?

Regards,
